commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Cloudflare-backed remote archive configuration, remote read/search/status/login commands, cloud publish ingestion, keyring token storage, README/changelog text, tests, a crawlkit upgrade, and a bundled autoreview skill.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR findings from source inspection: cloud publish drops stored Auth, cloud-mode doctor uses the env-only token resolver, and intValue converts remote int64 data to int. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: This member-authored feature PR needs maintainer/security review and contributor-side fixes because the agent-skill scope and remote auth contract are ownership decisions, not a safe autonomous repair lane.
